calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Ann Mendoza, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner, Jeffrey Scott Dubois present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Jeff Robertson Dubois.
Decree signed in open court.
